Package com.github.siroshun09.event4j.handlerlist

Interface HandlerList<T extends Event>

  • Type Parameters:
    T - the type of event
    public interface HandlerList<T extends Event>
    An interface that manages listeners of the event.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static <T extends Event>
      @NotNull HandlerList<T>      		 create()
      Creates a new HandlerList.
      int getSize()
      Gets the number of subscribed listeners.
      void post​(T event)
      Dispatches the event to subscribed listeners.
      boolean subscribe​(@NotNull Key key, @NotNull Listener<T> listener)
      Subscribes the listener.
      boolean subscribe​(@NotNull Key key, @NotNull Listener<T> listener, @NotNull Priority priority)
      Subscribes the listener.
      boolean unsubscribe​(@NotNull Listener<T> listener)
      Unsubscribes the listener.
      boolean unsubscribe​(@NotNull Listener<T> listener, @NotNull Priority priority)
      Unsubscribes the listener of the specified priority.
      void unsubscribeAll​(@NotNull Key key)
      Unsubscribes all listeners subscribed with the specified Key.

    • Method Detail

      • create

        @Contract(value=" -> new",
          pure=true)
@NotNull
static <T extends Event> @NotNull HandlerList<T> create()
        Creates a new HandlerList.
        Type Parameters:
        T - the type of event
        Returns:
        a new HandlerList

      • post

        void post​(@NotNull
          T event)
        Dispatches the event to subscribed listeners.
        Parameters:
        event - the event instance

      • subscribe

        boolean subscribe​(@NotNull
                  @NotNull Key key,
                  @NotNull
                  @NotNull Listener<T> listener)
        Subscribes the listener.

        This method subscribes the listener with Priority.NORMAL.

        Parameters:
        key - the key to be used to subscribe the listener
        listener - the listener to subscribe
        Returns:
        true if it is subscribed, false otherwise

      • subscribe

        boolean subscribe​(@NotNull
                  @NotNull Key key,
                  @NotNull
                  @NotNull Listener<T> listener,
                  @NotNull
                  @NotNull Priority priority)
        Subscribes the listener.
        Parameters:
        key - the key to be used to subscribe the listener
        listener - the listener to subscribe
        priority - the priority of the listener
        Returns:
        true if it is subscribed, false otherwise

      • unsubscribe

        boolean unsubscribe​(@NotNull
                    @NotNull Listener<T> listener)
        Unsubscribes the listener.

        The listener instance must be the same as when you subscribed it to be unregistered.

        Parameters:
        listener - the listener instance to unsubscribe
        Returns:
        true if it is unsubscribed, false otherwise

      • unsubscribe

        boolean unsubscribe​(@NotNull
                    @NotNull Listener<T> listener,
                    @NotNull
                    @NotNull Priority priority)
        Unsubscribes the listener of the specified priority.

        The listener instance must be the same as when you subscribed it to be unsubscribed.

        Parameters:
        listener - the listener instance to unsubscribe
        priority - the priority of the listener.
        Returns:
        true if it is unsubscribed, false otherwise

      • unsubscribeAll

        void unsubscribeAll​(@NotNull
                    @NotNull Key key)
        Unsubscribes all listeners subscribed with the specified Key.
        Parameters:
        key - the key to unsubscribe

      • getSize

        int getSize()
        Gets the number of subscribed listeners.
        Returns:
        the number of subscribed listeners.
